subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and handmaids of the All-Merciful! Praise be unto God that in these days, when the massed clouds of war have darkened the horizons of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و اماء رحمن الحمد لله ایامیکه سحاب متراکمه جنگ آفاق عالم را تاریک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
